suggestions.description: While Option 2 is the stronger choice, consider documenting the pg scoring caveat explicitly in the final recommendation to ensure future reviewers understand why benchmark hygiene was deprioritized - the semantic_paraphrase gap (P@1 0.375 vs overall 0.800) represents a ~53% relative drop that directly impacts user-facing relevance, making it the clear priority.
